think.notes: PRD reverse review complete. Phase-A boundary corrected. Spectra proposal/design/spec/tasks complete; analyze clean; validate pass. G1 technical checklist re-audited 6/6. Human sign-off received.

plan.notes: Phase-A Spectra proposal, design, delta spec, and 13-task plan complete and archived.

build.notes: Focused hardened suite 35/35 and tsc pass. Scope guard pass. No dependency added. Semgrep/Trivy unavailable; three-lens Spectra audit used and all high findings fixed.

review.notes: Spec and standards review complete. Full suite baseline: 100 pass, 30 unrelated Windows/Bash harness failures.

test.notes: G2 pending. Dependency tree restored; focused tests 35/35 and type-check pass. Scoped Stryker completed 1,433 mutants: 57.50% score, 770 killed, 54 timed out, 348 survived, 261 no coverage. Required threshold is 85%. Manual e2e verification 2026-07-18: installed package into a real external end-user project, ran pl-enforcement-kernel, output matched expected. Does not satisfy G2 (mutation score, surviving-mutant review, dependency rescan still outstanding) but confirms real-world behavior is correct.

G1.notes: Technical checklist re-audited after PRD/Spectra refresh: parser subset fail-closed, path containment, no source evaluation, project-relative diagnostics, host-neutral Phase-A golden outputs, src-only blast radius, rollback by file removal/revert. 6/6 technical checks pass. Human approved G1; approval covers planning Phase A only, not implementation, Phase B, or dogfood activation.

G2.notes: Blocked: scoped Stryker completed at 57.50%, below required 85% (770 killed, 54 timed out, 348 survived, 261 no coverage). Survivor review and focused test hardening remain. Full integration baseline has 30 non-Phase-A Windows/Bash failures. Human sign-off remains pending.
